synopsis: [El-errata] New Ksplice updates for UEKR8 6.12.0 on OL9 and OL10 (ELSA-2026-50060)
overview: Synopsis: ELSA-2026-50060 can now be patched using Ksplice
full_text:
Synopsis: ELSA-2026-50060 can now be patched using Ksplice
CVEs: CVE-2025-40248

Users with Oracle Linux Premier Support can now use Ksplice to patch
against the latest Oracle Linux Security Advisory, ELSA-2026-50060.
More information about this errata can be found at
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-50060.html

INSTALLING THE UPDATES

We recommend that all users of Ksplice Uptrack running UEKR8 6.12.0 on
OL9 and OL10 install these updates.

On systems that have "autoinstall = yes" in /etc/uptrack/uptrack.conf,
these updates will be installed automatically and you do not need to
take any action.

Alternatively, you can install these updates by running:

# /usr/sbin/uptrack-upgrade -y


DESCRIPTION

* CVE-2025-40248: Use-after-free in Virtual Socket protocol driver.

Orabug: 38858283


SUPPORT

Ksplice support is available at ksplice-support_ww at oracle.com.
